placement_rules: Place on Water terrain.
benefit: Passive: This tile connects the settlement network across a river through this tile.
notes: Bridge now carries explicit river-crossing infrastructure under connected settlement network rules.

placement_rules: Place on Water terrain.
benefit: Passive: This tile connects the settlement network across a river through this tile. This tile has Supported.
notes: Bridge now carries explicit river-crossing infrastructure under connected settlement network rules.

placement_rules: Place as a normal Housing Tile. Vanguard only.
notes: Replaces old Steward House row.

placement_rules: Place as a normal Housing Tile. Vanguard only.
benefit: Steward Power: Once per Season, on your turn, when you place a Travel Tile or Resource Tile, you may place it without spending an Action. All normal costs and requirements still apply.
notes: Replaces old Steward House row.

notes: Replaces old Steward House row.

benefit: Special Placement: Place both Stables as single-hex tiles in one action. Passive: While not Overstrained, placed Stables connect their connected settlement networks to each other.
notes: Unlocks Two Copies

placement_rules: Place on Water terrain.
benefit: Passive: If placed adjacent to Water terrain, this tile connects its connected settlement network to every other tile placed adjacent to Water terrain. This does not permit normal tile placement on Water unless a tile explicitly allows it.
Passive: While this tile is not Overstrained, adjacent tiles have Supported.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Social Tile.
benefit: Once per round, when any player places a housing tile adjacent to this tile, that tile costs 0 Resources. The tile must still satisfy all placement requirements and action costs.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to Ruins terrain.
benefit: Activated Effect: Exchange up to 5 total resources in the Warehouse for the same number of non-Goods resources in any mix.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Merchant Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect, once per Season: Resolve 1 active Burden.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Farm.
benefit: Passive: When an adjacent Farm is activated for Resource production, gain 2 additional Food.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Social Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect, once per Season: Resolve 1 active Burden.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Travel Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect: Look at the top 3 cards of the Encounter Deck, then return them in any order.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to Wildlands.
benefit: Passive: When an adjacent Wildlands is activated for Resource production, gain 2 additional Herbs.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Mine.
benefit: Passive: When an adjacent Mine is activated for Resource production, gain 2 additional resources of types that Mine can produce.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Forest.
benefit: Passive: When an adjacent Forest is activated for Resource production, gain 2 additional resources of types that Forest can produce.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Travel Tile.
benefit: Once per round, when any player places a tile adjacent to this tile, reduce that tile's cost by 2 resource of the group's choice. Cost reductions cannot reduce costs below 0.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Travel Tile.
benefit: Passive: While this tile is not Overstrained, Travel Tiles in this tile's connected settlement network have Supported.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Housing Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect, once per Season: Remove 1 Strain from one adjacent Housing, Social, or Wellbeing Tile.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Housing Tile or Wellbeing Tile.
benefit: Passive: When players resolve an active Burden, remove 1 Strain from 1 placed tile.
